title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 305.110 - Leaving aircraft running — penalty
text:
305.110.  Leaving aircraft running — penalty. — Any person who shall leave any aircraft with its engine running, and unoccupied by a person able to control the same, and without blocking the same in such manner as to prevent such aircraft from moving, shall be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor.
(RSMo 1939 § 15115) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 13914
